MCV [Entitic mean volume] in Red Blood Cells by Automated count
MCHC [Entitic Mass/volume] in Red Blood Cells by Automated count
Erythrocyte distribution width [Entitic volume] by Automated count

Platelet distribution width [Entitic volume] in Blood by Automated count
Platelet [Entitic mean volume] in Blood by Automated count

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mild normocytic, normochromic anemia (low hemoglobin and hematocrit) with normal leukocyte and platelet counts. Platelet distribution width is elevated, suggesting increased platelet size variability, which may indicate reactive or regenerative changes. No acute cytopenias or leukocytosis are present. Correlation with clinical context and further evaluation of anemia etiology is recommended.

display.value: Acute ST segment elevation myocardial infarction

text.div: Provider Organization: Presidio ospedalieri G. Castelli
